text:
Mr. Pikeoil is a teacher appearing in Attack on Playtime, the seventh short story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Mr. Pikeoil is a bald man who wears a white shirt with a tie and a sleeveless sweater.

Story

Mr. Pikeoil is the literature teacher in Hodge's school. During a class when she does not pay attention, he yells at her and threatens to ground her again. As he asks her if she is ready for show and tell, she calls an Abnormal Titan called Petunia. He begins to tell Hodge she will be expelled for that but is interrupted by Petunia who kills him.
